_instructions: Add ALL blocks below to your VS Code user settings.json.
Open it: Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P) → Preferences: Open User Settings (JSON)
STEP 1 — run the proxy (downloads phi-4-mini ~2.5GB on first run):
STEP 2 — add the settings below to settings.json, then reload VS Code.
chatLanguageModels  → used by agent .md files (@harness-* sub-agents via vscode.lm API)
github.copilot.*    → used by Copilot Chat Ask mode AND Agent mode
_block1_chatLanguageModels_comment: Add this to chatLanguageModels.json (or your provider list)
_block2_settings_json_comment: Add this to your VS Code settings.json (required for Agent mode)
